reviews.comment:
El ambiente está para calificar mejor, pero no está bien señalizada la entrada a la estación de servicio y de noche no se puede ver bien ya que es muy oscuro y no tiene carteles para ingresar.

(Translated by Google)
The atmosphere could be better, but the entrance to the gas station is not well signposted and at night it is difficult to see because it is very dark and there are no signs to indicate the entrance.

reviews.comment:
Esta muy buena to compro o voy a tomar algo pero como ex plyera gerente y supervisora de estaciones varias cargo en la de color rojo con naranja me rinde mas.. no digo que sea mala es solo mi opinion y la atencion de mil en cuanto a productos si los compro son excelentes saludos!

(Translated by Google)
This is very good; I buy something there or go for a drink, but as a former manager and supervisor of various stations, I prefer the red and orange one because it lasts me longer. I'm not saying it's bad, it's just my opinion. And the service is excellent, as are the products; if I buy them, they're superb. Greetings!
